hero_title_accent: Your English just hasn't caught up yet.
hero_sub: We exist because the world is full of people whose talent outpaces their English. We're here to close that gap — with coaches, not courses. Conversations, not classrooms.
vision_text: A world where your language never holds your ambition hostage. Where the smartest person in the room is also the most articulate — in any language they choose.
history_p1: We started Speexify because we lived the problem. We knew people who studied English for years but still froze in interviews. Who understood everything but couldn't express themselves. Who had the skills for their dream job — except the voice.
history_p2: So we built something different. Not another course. Not another app. A place where real human coaches meet you where you are and push you toward where you want to be. Live. Adaptive. Relentless about your progress.
value1_desc: We don't teach you what to think. We give you the voice to say what you already know — with clarity, confidence, and impact.
value2_desc: No textbooks. No scripts. Just real, messy, human conversations with coaches who know exactly how to push you forward.
value3_title: We understand where you're coming from
value3_desc: The hesitation. The translating in your head. The freeze before a meeting. We've seen it — and we've built a system that breaks through it.
value4_title: Progress you can feel in weeks
value4_desc: Not vague promises. The interview you nail. The meeting you lead. The call you stop dreading. That's what we measure.
life_p1: We're a remote team across time zones, united by one obsession: making sure talent is never silenced by language.
life_p2: Every coach, every team member — we've witnessed the moment someone finally sounds like themselves. That moment is why we exist.
timeline1_text: Speexify begins as a small coaching collective focused on real-world English.
timeline2_text: Launched 24/7 scheduling and built a global network of expert coaches.
timeline3_text: Expanded to serve learners across multiple countries with personalised paths.
timeline4_text: Introduced AI-assisted practice to make every session even more powerful.
leaders_subtitle: We've lived this journey — now we're here to guide yours
testimonials_title: Don't take our word for it
testimonials_subtitle: Hear from people who were exactly where you are
testi1_quote: I went from muting myself on calls to leading client meetings. Speexify didn't teach me English — they unleashed it.
testi2_quote: Two months with Speexify changed more than 10 years of studying ever did. I finally sound like myself in English.
testi3_quote: The interview coaching landed me my dream job on the first try. Worth every session.
testi4_quote: I travel solo now and actually connect with people. My English went from a barrier to a bridge.
cta_title: The gap between you and fluency? One conversation.
cta_text: Your ambition brought you here. Your voice will take you everywhere else.
offer_subtitle: Not courses — capabilities you'll use tomorrow
offer_card1_text: Walk in and sound like you belong there. Because you do.
offer_card2_text: Stop translating in your head. Start thinking and speaking in English — naturally.
offer_card3_text: Connect anywhere. Travel fearlessly. Turn your English from a barrier into a bridge.
offer_card4_text: IELTS, TOEFL, university vivas — walk in knowing exactly how to land it.
digital_only_note: All Speexify services are delivered online. Coaching and platform access — no physical goods shipped.
